name: Oil & Refining
description: Indian downstream PSU oil marketing and refining companies. Cyclical earnings driven by crude prices and GRMs.

name: IT Services
description: Large-cap Indian IT exporters. Cash-rich, dividend-paying, currently navigating a generative-AI driven demand reset.

name: Private Banks
description: Top private-sector banks by market cap. Watch ROA, NIM compression, and deposit growth.

name: FMCG
description: Consumer staples giants. Premium valuations, defensive cash flows, and slow but steady growth.

name: Cement
description: Indian cement majors. Cyclical, capex-heavy, currently consolidating after a wave of M&A.
